items.title: The great (small business) wealth transfer: McKinsey sees $5 trillion of baby boomer companies coming up for sale over the next decade
items.description: Move over, Great Wealth Transfer. The McKinsey Institute for Economic Mobility sees the next decade as make or break for the Great Ownership Transfer.

items.title: Why Pennsylvania sits at the center of the big data-center power problem
items.description: Its old, slow and sits at the center of both the midAtlantic and Midwestern regional grids. What could go wrong?

items.title: The BAFTA Tourette racial slur controversy, explained, by a sociologist with Tourette’s who studies social stigma
items.description: Tourette syndrome remains a deeply misunderstood condition, especially when it comes to obscene language tics, called coprolalia.

items.title: The remote work fight isn’t over: Workers are willing to take a major pay cut, up to 25%, Harvard study shows
items.description: Harvard, Brown, and UCLA researchers found workers would be willing to take a massive pay cut to work from home.
